title: Amtech N0980 Double tool and nail pouch
features: DURABLE: This double tool and nail pouch is made from heavy duty polyester for durability
VERSATILE: With 20 assorted pockets, it has a tape measure holder and two hammer loops and is ideal for storing a wide range of tools and accessories
EASY TO ADJUST: It has a 50mm wide belt adjustable to a 120 cm (48") waist with a quick release buckle for easy adjustment
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
TIME SAVING: Enhances productivity through fast and accurate cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x DOUBLE TOOL AND NAIL POUCH See more
